## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Changes

- [ ] Added new skill(s)
- [ ] Modified existing skill(s)
- [ ] Fixed bug(s)
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] Updated `registry.json`
- [ ] Updated triggers/keywords

## Description

Detailed description of the changes.

## Skill Description Format

If adding or modifying skills, confirm descriptions follow the standard format:
> "Use when [trigger condition], [what the skill does], [why it matters]."

- [ ] All new/modified skill descriptions follow this format

## Testing

- [ ] Tested the router activates the skill correctly
- [ ] Tested the skill works as described
- [ ] Verified no conflicts with existing skills

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Descriptions are clear and follow the standard format
- [ ] `registry.json` is updated if adding new skills
- [ ] No duplicate functionality with existing skills
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (Claude Code / Cursor / etc.)
